authShell.uiCoverageValue: Routing, auth flow, file manager, trash, quota, security
authShell.backendWaitingValue: Real Auth/File/Preview endpoints and upload pipeline

landing.badge: Frontend aligned to current project roadmap
landing.heroTitle: Not another landing page, but a working SPA scaffold for cloud storage.
landing.heroDescription: Backend is still catching up to full Auth/File/Preview stack, so frontend is built as an integration scaffold: real routes, screens, state and UX are ready, and APIs can be connected as endpoints appear.
landing.scopeItem1: File manager, folder navigation, search, sorting, trash and quotas.
landing.scopeItem2: Auth screens, verify/reset flow and prepared security/2FA section.
landing.scopeItem3: Preview modal and integration-ready layer for File/Preview API.

pillars.workflowDescription: Drag & drop, folder structure, trash, preview layer and quota are merged into one UI.
pillars.authDescription: Separate screens for login, register, verify email, reset password and security settings.
pillars.integrationDescription: Components are prepared for Auth/File/Preview services and not tied to the current landing.

login.title: Sign in to workspace
login.description: Current backend auth is not fully implemented yet, so this screen already has production-like UX, but works on local store until API integration.
login.twoFactorIntro: Two-factor protection is enabled for {email}. In demo mode use TOTP code 246810 or one of backup codes from security page.
login.totpInvalid: Invalid TOTP or backup code. Try again.
login.demoHint: Demo mode: if 2FA is enabled for account, an extra verification step appears after login. Then connect POST /api/auth/login and TOTP challenge flow.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Registration screen matches roadmap: dedicated page prepared for verify-email and future backend validation.
register.name: Name

forgotPassword.title: Reset password request
forgotPassword.description: This page is prepared for request-reset endpoint and is already part of app auth-flow.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.description: New password is not sent to backend yet, but route and form are already prepared for full reset-password flow.
resetPassword.demoEmailInfo: In demo mode the email flow is simulated by opening this page for {email}.
resetPassword.saveAndBack: Save and return to sign in

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.description: Verification page is split into dedicated route and ready for verify-email endpoint, resend flow and success state.
verifyEmail.sentTo: Verification email sent to {email}. In demo mode confirmation is simulated by the button below.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Route is not present in current frontend slice. Return to landing or open file manager.

files.bulkDownloadSoon: Bulk download will be enabled after archive API integration.
files.selectionMovedHint: Moving: {name}. Drop onto folder or breadcrumbs to change parent.
files.emptyDescription: Create a folder, drag files here, or use search to check other sections.

preview.pdfDescription: Space for browser PDF preview is ready. After Preview Service is available, page renders or iframe with presigned URL can be connected here.
preview.documentDescription: Component is ready for docx/xlsx preview and thumbnails. Until preview API appears, it shows integration placeholder.
preview.metadataDescription: For unsupported formats there is a safe metadata fallback. Later add presigned download or specialized viewer.
preview.backendStepDescription: Connect GET /api/preview/:id and GET /api/files/:id/download so this modal becomes a full viewer.

uploadZone.title: Upload and data structure
uploadZone.compactDescription: Quick access to upload files and create folders in current section.
uploadZone.description: Component already covers drag & drop, folder creation and local state updates. Once backend is ready, upload endpoint and Axios progress can be connected here.

trash.title: Trash
trash.description: Dedicated trash page closes roadmap sprint 5. Restore and hard-delete are already implemented on UI + store level.
trash.emptyDescription: When backend soft-delete endpoints are ready, this page will receive data from API.

security.title: Account security
security.description: Control center for sign-in methods, recovery and 2FA. All screens are ready for backend endpoint integration.
security.twoFactorDescription: After enabling, sign in requires separate TOTP challenge step.
security.emailDescription: Email verification and confirmation-link resend flow.
security.passwordDescription: Reset request email and new password screen.
security.backupDescription: Codes are hidden by default. Re-auth is required to reveal.
security.backupUnavailable: Backup codes are available only after enabling 2FA.
security.identityDescription: To reveal backup codes, re-enter account password.
security.backupModalDescription: Store codes in a safe place. Each code can be used only once.
security.backupMissing: No backup codes found. Disable and enable 2FA to generate again.

billing.title: Storage plans
billing.description: This screen currently runs in frontend mock mode. Payment integration will be connected after billing API is ready.
billing.successMessage: Plan updated successfully. New quota is already applied to workspace.
billing.downgradeBlocked: Cannot apply: currently using {used} at limit {limit}.
